interlinearizer.project.label: %interlinearizer_menu_column_project%
interlinearizer.project.localizeNotes: Interlinearizer top menu column for project actions

items.label: %interlinearizer_selectProject%
items.localizeNotes: Interlinearizer top menu > Open the project selector to switch to or manage existing interlinear projects

items.label: %interlinearizer_newProject%
items.localizeNotes: Interlinearizer top menu > Create a brand-new interlinear project for the current source project

items.label: %interlinearizer_viewProjectInfo%
items.localizeNotes: Interlinearizer top menu > View and edit metadata for the active interlinearizer project, or delete it

items.label: %interlinearizer_openForProject%
items.localizeNotes: Scripture Editor top menu > Open Interlinearizer for this project
